candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue row; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; suitable fallback if primary row is missing.
Non-revenue operating income, not sales/revenue.

variables.notes: Using the direct revenue label first, with the duplicate total row as fallback per priority-list rule.

Candidate list is empty. Chose 'Material and services' from the full preview as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line. Other nearby rows like inventory change and capitalized own work may also be part of a fuller COGS bridge, so manual review is needed.

candidates.why: Could be overhead personnel cost, but may also include production labor; less preferred if explicit SG&A exists.
Overhead-type operating expense bucket, but less preferred than an explicit SG&A line under the stated hierarchy.
Explicit SG&A line item; populated and therefore preferred as the sole SG&A selection.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A subcomponent, but explicit SG&A row exists so subtotal line should be preferred alone.
R&D line exists but appears in supplemental/below-EBIT section, so not needed in SG&A selection.
Non-recurring item; not appropriate for core SG&A mapping.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule.

candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; should be excluded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not current R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense line; best semantic match.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated R&D expense line. It appears in the supplemental/lower section, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broader finance expense bucket; useful fallback when direct interest expense line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses debt and other borrowings
candidates.why: Most direct interest expense line; preferred primary choice.
Interest-related but narrower lease-specific component; lower-priority fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest disclosure; lower-priority fallback.
Balancing value row, should not be used unless nothing else exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses debt and other borrowings

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct borrowing-interest line first, broader finance expense second for years where the direct line is missing, and lease interest as a narrower fallback.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit /loss accounted for using the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using the equity method
candidates.why: Asset investment line, not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred parent/owner equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests; only fallback if owner equity line did not exist.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line selected to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement OCI/allocation context, less preferred than balance sheet line.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred mapping for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI label first, with synonymous fallback label second.
